properties.displayName: Crypto-wallet file/keystore access by non-wallet process
properties.description: Stealers / wallet drainers read keystore.json, MetaMask, Exodus, Atomic, Phantom data.
properties.query:
ImFileEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
| where TargetFilePath has_any (@"\Ethereum\keystore\", @"\Bitcoin\",
                                  @"\Exodus\", @"\Electrum\wallets\",
                                  @"\MetaMask\", @"\Phantom\",
                                  @"\Atomic\Local Storage\")
| where ActingProcessName !in~ ("MetaMask.exe","Exodus.exe","Atomic.exe",
                                  "electrum.exe","Bitcoin.exe","Phantom.exe")
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername, ActingProcessName,
          TargetFilePath, TargetFileName, EventType
